info.name: Library ERP - Auth, Libraries, Students & Users
info.description:
Postman collection for the Library ERP backend — Auth, RBAC, Libraries, Branches, Students, Seats, Attendance, Payments, Analytics, Reports, and Users.

Usage:
1. Import the matching environment `Library-ERP.postman_environment.json`.
2. Set `baseUrl` (default: http://localhost:5000/api/v1).
3. Run **Login** first; scripts populate `accessToken` / `refreshToken`.
4. Library flows populate `libraryId` and `branchId` when applicable.
5. Payment flows can persist `feePlanId`, `invoiceId`, and `paymentId` from create/collect responses.
6. Authenticated requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

request.description: Requires `analytics.view` or `report.view`. Optional `libraryId`/`branchId` for SUPER_ADMIN scoping.
Requires `analytics.view` or `report.view` and `payment.read`.
Tenant-scoped activity feed from audit logs. Alias: GET /dashboard/recent-activity
Role-aware global search (libraries, students, seats, invoices, etc.).
Requires `report.view` or `analytics.view` and `student.read`. SUPER_ADMIN must pass `libraryId`.
Binary CSV download. Requires `payment.read`.
Aggregated payment totals by UTC day.
Always returns a generic success message. In development without SMTP, check server logs for the reset URL.
Rotates refresh token. New access + refresh tokens are returned and saved to env.
Requires `library.read`. SUPER_ADMIN sees all tenants; LIBRARY_OWNER is scoped to their library.
Requires `library.create` (platform super admin).
Requires `library.update`.
Requires `branch.create` (owner / super admin).
Requires `branch.delete` (owner / super admin).
Requires `library.delete` and zero branches remaining.
Requires `student.read` or `student.read.basic` (limited fields for basic).
Requires `student.create`. Uses `branchId` from environment.
Requires `student.transfer`. Target branch must be in the same library.
Requires `student.assignSeat`.
STUDENT self profile endpoint.
STUDENT own attendance list.
STUDENT wallet: `GET /students/me/payments` returns outstanding totals plus `invoices` and `payments` for the linked student.
STUDENT own seat details.
`feePlan.read`, `payment.read`, or `payment.create`.
Requires `feePlan.create`. **SUPER_ADMIN** must send `libraryId` matching the branch's library. Tenant roles omit `libraryId` (JWT scope is used).

query.description: Invoice #, student name, phone, studentId code, seat number.

request.description: Requires `payment.read`. List items are enriched with `studentName`, `studentCode`, `studentPhone`, `seatNumber`, `branchName`, `feePlanName`, `invoiceId`, `lastPaymentId`, `hasActivePayments` when applicable. Use `libraryId`/`branchId` for SUPER_ADMIN tenant scope.
Requires `payment.create`. **SUPER_ADMIN** must send `libraryId` matching the branch's library. Tenant roles omit `libraryId`. Optionally set `feePlanId` and omit `amount` when billing from a plan.
Requires `payment.read`. Run **Invoices — Create** first or paste an `invoiceId`.
Requires `payment.create`. Amount must not exceed due unless `allowOverpayment: true` and caller has `payment.update`.
Requires `payment.read`. Students may only call this for their own `studentId`.
Requires `payment.read`. Invoices with positive due in UNPAID / PARTIAL / OVERDUE.
Requires `payment.read`. Promotes eligible rows to OVERDUE then lists past-due balances.
Requires `payment.read`. Run **Collect Payment** first or paste a `paymentId`.
`seat.read` or `seat.occupancy.read`. SUPER_ADMIN filters by query; tenant roles use JWT scope.
Requires `seat.create`.
Requires `seat.bulkCreate`.
Requires `seat.assign`. Student must be in the same branch.
Requires `seat.unassign`.
Requires `user.read` or `staff.read`. SUPER_ADMIN may filter by `libraryId` / `branchId`.

Requires `user.create` (SUPER_ADMIN) or `staff.create` (LIBRARY_OWNER). Staff roles require `libraryId` and `branchId`; the branch must belong to that library. `LIBRARY_OWNER` requires `libraryId` only. `SUPER_ADMIN` role must not send tenant fields. Student logins are not created here (Students module).
Soft-deactivates the account (`isActive: false`).
Requires `notification.read`.

query.description: Search name, email, phone, role label

request.description: Requires `notification.send`. Selector-friendly user rows for the send UI.

Requires `notification.send`. Optional `includeSelf` (default false) excludes the sender from LIBRARY/ROLE/BRANCH/PLATFORM/STUDENTS_WITH_DUES. SUPER_ADMIN must include `libraryId` in the JSON body when not using PLATFORM.
Requires `notification.manage`.
Requires `notification.manage`. Set `notificationLogId` from a list-logs response `_id`.
Requires SUPER_ADMIN session.

request.description: Public registration was removed; user listing requires authentication.
